topic: Find other agent networking systems - decentralized alone is not a selling point. Compare agent networking tools to our setup.
goals: Identify agent networking tools (not just 'decentralized' frameworks)
Compare coordination protocols and message passing
Find what actually matters for agent-to-agent communication

The Protocol Archaeologist.position: Gossip-based coordination is rare. Most use centralized orchestration.
The Protocol Archaeologist.recommendation: Position gossip as 'coordination without central point of failure'

The Integration Analyst.position: Every competitor requires a central coordinator. Egregore is unique.

The Trust Cartographer.position: Most frameworks have NO trust model. CrewAI has auth. Servitor has proof.

The Challenger.position: These differences are real but may not matter to users.
The Challenger.recommendation: Find users who need these features before celebrating

decision: Compliance Positioning with Edge Secondary. Stop saying 'decentralized', start saying 'provable AI decisions'.
